item.title: BOOTSTRAP_MAX_CHARS 20_000 scattered across 4 files
item.intent: Bootstrap max chars has a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No bare 20_000 literal appears in runtime code outside that file.
item.description: The constant 20_000 (bootstrap max chars limit) is defined as a local magic number in four separate files: src/design/configure/generate.ts:127, src/design/identity/index.ts:27, src/operate/doctor/checks.ts:393, and src/config/validate.ts:26. This is the same BUG-011/BUG-025 constant-scattering pattern. If the limit changes, all four files must be updated. Steps: (1) add BOOTSTRAP_MAX_CHARS = 20_000 to src/config/defaults.ts with a comment describing its purpose; (2) import and replace the literal in generate.ts, identity/index.ts, doctor/checks.ts, and validate.ts; (3) run full test suite. Scope: 5 files, ~6 lines changed. Zero logic change — pure constant extraction.
